serving.description: One set of 6 assorted donuts and 2 Dunkin' Bears
serving.natural_language_portion: One set typically contains six assorted donuts and two Dunkin' Bear-shaped pastries or candies, suitable for sharing.

nutrient_source.title: Doughnut, yeast-leavened, glazed
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Nutrient values adapted from USDA FoodData Central for 'Doughnut, yeast-leavened, glazed' (FDC ID 19075) as a representative base for assorted donuts. The 'bears' component is assumed to have a similar nutritional profile to a small pastry or candy, which is broadly covered by the donut's profile for estimation purposes.

gi_source.title: Doughnut, Krispy Kreme Original Glazed
gi_source.source_match_notes: Glycemic index estimated from 'Doughnut, Krispy Kreme Original Glazed' (GI=76) from the University of Sydney GI Database, as a representative high-sugar, high-carb donut. The 'assorted' nature and inclusion of 'bears' suggests a similar high glycemic impact.

hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should consume this food in moderation due to its sodium and saturated fat content, which can contribute to elevated blood pressure.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High glycemic index, high sugar content, high carbohydrate load
type2_diabetes.guidance: This food has a high glycemic index and high sugar content, leading to a significant glycemic load per serving, making it unsuitable for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: High saturated fat, trans fat, sugar, and cholesterol content
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Due to its high saturated fat, trans fat, sugar, and cholesterol, this food should be avoided or consumed very rarely by individuals with cardiovascular disease to minimize risk factors.

llm_training.natural_language_description: This food item is a Valentine's special from Dunkin' Donuts, featuring six assorted regular donuts and two Dunkin' Bear-shaped pastries or candies. Donuts are typically sweet, fried or baked dough, often glazed or topped with various icings and sprinkles. The 'bears' are likely small, sweet baked goods or confections. This combination offers a variety of flavors and textures, characteristic of a dessert or celebratory treat. Nutritionally, this item is high in calories, carbohydrates, sugars, and fats, including saturated and trans fats, making it a high glycemic food. It is generally considered an ultra-processed food.
common_user_queries: Calories in Dunkin' Donuts assorted pack

confidence_reason: Nutrient values are adapted from a generic glazed yeast-leavened doughnut from USDA FoodData Central (FDC ID 19075), as the exact 'assorted donuts & Dunkin' Bears' product is not available. Glycemic index is an analogous estimate from a similar high-sugar doughnut from the University of Sydney GI Database. The 'bears' component is estimated to have a similar nutritional profile to a small pastry or candy, contributing to the overall estimation.
notes: Original source field survey data is not an approved nutrient source. All nutrient and GI data are from approved secondary sources. Vitamin C and D are confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. The `cuisine` was changed from 'Coffee' to 'Desserts' for accuracy, and `food_group` was also set to 'Desserts'. The `region_of_origin` is set to 'United States' as the origin of the Dunkin' Donuts brand and the general food type, though the product is sold in Singapore.
